evals.prompt: I want to build my own personal brand on social media. I have a website digischola.in. Can you analyze it and build the brand wiki?
evals.expected_output: Skill activates. Creates Desktop/{Brand}/brand/_engine/wiki/ folder with 9 wiki files. Runs mine_transcripts.py. Falls back to Chrome MCP for SPA rendering when WebFetch returns thin content. Produces 5-7 pillar candidates in pillars.md with AWAITING APPROVAL status. Asks user to approve 3-5 pillars before any downstream skill can run.

assertions.name: folder_structure
assertions.description: Desktop/{Brand}/brand/_engine/ exists with wiki/ subfolder containing 7 md files (brand-wiki.md, brand-identity.md, credentials.md, voice-guide.md, pillars.md, icp.md, channel-playbook.md), plus _engine/idea-bank.json and _engine/wiki-config.json at the _engine root

assertions.name: chrome_fallback_triggered
assertions.description: When WebFetch returns <500 chars, skill escalates to Chrome MCP per fallback-chain.md

assertions.name: pillars_awaiting_approval
assertions.description: pillars.md contains AWAITING APPROVAL banner, 5-7 candidates, and recommended final set

assertions.name: universal_rules_captured
assertions.description: voice-guide.md Universal Rules section lists explicit user corrections with transcript sample numbers as sources

assertions.name: credentials_locked
assertions.description: credentials.md marked LOCKED with source inventory from public website

evals.prompt: Rebuild my brand wiki with new pillars — I want to pivot from [1] MarketingOS to a focus on AI for solo freelancers specifically.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects existing wiki at Desktop/{Brand}/brand/_engine/wiki/, reads current pillars.md, treats this as a REFRESH not a fresh build. Regenerates pillar candidates weighted toward the new focus. Preserves brand-identity.md and credentials.md (LOCKED — still from public site). Updates pillars.md + channel-playbook.md (cadence may shift). Requires user re-approval before lock.

assertions.name: refresh_detected
assertions.description: Skill identifies existing wiki and runs in refresh mode, not fresh build

assertions.name: locked_files_preserved
assertions.description: brand-identity.md and credentials.md are NOT overwritten

assertions.name: pillars_regenerated
assertions.description: New pillar candidates proposed with new focus reflected in thesis statements

assertions.name: re_approval_gate
assertions.description: Skill surfaces the new candidates and pauses for user approval before locking

evals.prompt: I have no website yet, but I want to start building my personal brand as an AI consultant. Can you extract what you can from our conversation history?
evals.expected_output: Skill runs with only 3 of 5 inputs (analyst profile + CLI transcripts + memory; no website, no brand guide). Marks brand-identity.md as LIMITED with BLANK explanations for missing visual design tokens. Still produces full voice-guide.md, pillars.md, icp.md from available data. Flags in _engine/wiki-config.json that brand-identity needs a brand-guide input when user has one.

assertions.name: graceful_partial_inputs
assertions.description: Skill produces all 9 files; missing-input files have BLANK fields with reasons instead of being omitted

assertions.name: brand_identity_flagged
assertions.description: brand-identity.md status shows LIMITED / needs-brand-guide-input rather than LOCKED

assertions.name: pillars_still_derived
assertions.description: pillars.md still produces 5-7 candidates from CLI + analyst profile even without website evidence
